raw.message:
Slam dunk on the tennis court with Tennis Clash! 🎾
This game is for you if you're ready to crush some serious serves and volleys. ✨

hook.summary: High-intensity tennis rally with excited commentary.
hook.visual_action: Two players exchanging fast shots on a purple tennis court in a stadium setting.

scene_flow: Fast-paced tennis rally between two players in a stadium setting.
Dramatic dive and return shot by the player in the foreground.
Winning point scored followed by a transition to a cinematic character pose.
Final splash screen with game logo and 'PLAY' button.
audience_proxy: Competitive sports fans and casual gamers who enjoy fast-paced, high-stakes athletic simulations.
